description: Stdio MCP: 17 verifiable AIMarket oracles, 35 pay-per-call tools for AI agents.
name: io.github.alexar76/aimarket-oracle-gateway

environmentVariables.description: AIMarket Hub base URL (recommended metered path)
environmentVariables.name: AIMARKET_HUB_URL

environmentVariables.description: Direct oracle-family URL (demo/free path if no hub)
environmentVariables.name: AIMARKET_ORACLE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Hard cap per call in USD (default 0.10)
environmentVariables.name: AIMARKET_MAX_PER_CALL_USD

environmentVariables.description: Hard cumulative budget for this process (default 5.0)
environmentVariables.name: AIMARKET_MAX_SPEND_USD

title: AIMarket Oracle Gateway
